name: Power Relay
description: Generates additional power for the Avenger.

name: Resistance Comms
description: Expands XCOM's communication range to contact more Resistance cells.
effects: Required for spreading to new regions

name: Guerrilla Tactics School (GTS)
description: Trains soldiers and allows squad size upgrades.

name: Workshop
description: Staffed by Gremlins that provide extra Engineer staff for adjacent facilities.
effects: 1 Gremlin per Workshop (up to 2 staffed at once)

name: Laboratory
effects: Reduces research time when Scientists are assigned

name: Advanced Warfare Center (AWC)
description: Allows wounded soldiers to recover faster and learn bonus abilities.
effects: Wounded soldiers recover faster when assigned
Soldiers can train an extra ability (WotC: Training Center replaces this)

name: Psi Lab
description: Train Psi Operatives and research psionic abilities.
effects: Each training takes days based on difficulty

name: Proving Grounds
description: Build experimental items and break down alien materials.
effects: Experimental items: grenades, ammo, armor upgrades

name: Shadow Chamber
description: Analyze alien artifacts to decode story missions and reduce Avatar Project.
effects: Required for story mission research (Blacksite Vial, Codex Brain, etc.)
Reduces research time for story items

name: Engineering Bay
effects: Reduces build time for manufactured items

name: Training Center
description: WotC: Replaces the AWC. Soldiers can train AP-costing abilities from other classes.
effects: Soldiers spend AP to learn abilities from the training pool

name: Infirmary
description: WotC: New facility for managing Will recovery and removing negative traits.
effects: Removes negative traits gained from trauma
Manages Will recovery for Shaken soldiers
Allows treatment of mental health effects
